channel.title: Local-Llm on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Local-Llm on Junho Lee

item.title: OpenHuman: Open-Source Personal AI Agent on the Desktop
item.description: An analysis of OpenHuman, an open-source personal AI agent that runs on the desktop using a hybrid architecture of local memory and cloud services.

item.title: Optimizing Local LLM Selection with whichllm
item.description: Use whichllm to detect hardware specifications and identify the best performing local LLMs based on real-world benchmarks rather than just parameter counts.
